examples: Humans eat, sleep and play, but we also speak, plot, rationalise and debate finer points of morality.
We are more likely to lie, research shows, when we are able to rationalise it, when we are stressed and fatigued or see others being dishonest.

Philosophy has a claim: it seeks to rationalise the behaviour of people with conflicting interests.
The Scottish government has confirmed it is endorsing a move to rationalise pay and conditions in colleges.
